properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the world outside is dark and stormy When the fears of life surround on every side Lord, sometimes I feel my faith begin to waver Tis then I look up and hear my Father say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lean on me-when the storm is raging I'm the solid rock- I'm the solid rock You're safe from harm I will endure - through the endless ages By faith look up - by faith look up And lean on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord sometimes I begin to look around me Friends seem few and I feel so all alone I'm overwhelmed and my heart is pained and burdened Then I remember I belong to the one who said

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thank you Lord, I bless you heavenly father How bright life is when I keep my eyes on you You're everything I have ever longed or hoped for When I cry for help, I feel your presence near
